message:
feat(supervisor): add restart intensity, extended child specs, and new APIs

Close the depth gap between upstream supervision.rs (92 pub fns) and
our C supervisor (was 7 API functions, now 15+):

1. Restart intensity tracker: time-windowed restart counting with
   storm detection. Records restart timestamps in a ring buffer
   and counts only those within the configured window.

2. Extended child specs (asx_child_spec_ext): named children,
   dependency tracking (depends_on indices), per-child shutdown
   budget, required flag, and lazy-start option.

3. New APIs: supervisor_start_ext (extended specs), child_name,
   exit_reason, intensity_exceeded.

4. Supervisor config now includes restart_window_ns for time-windowed
   intensity tracking and per-child shutdown_budget_polls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
